glm-flash.quant: UD-Q4_K_XL, ~20 GiB, q8_0 K/V cache at 128k context
glm-flash.notes: incumbent; llama-server on the rig. repeat_penalty 1.0 is deliberate: op JSON repeats keys and handles by design (glm4.7-flash.md). MoE, served on the R9700 (:8080 default).

qwen3.5-9b.notes: floor cell (roster: ~8-9B, any laptop). Raw mode expected near zero; scored separately per cross-model.md. repeat_penalty 1.0 deliberate. Served on the 3070 Ti (:8082); Q4_K_M deliberately over UD-Q4_K_XL because the 8GB card also hosts the embed server.

gpt-oss-20b-low.notes: reasoning_effort=low is a SERVER-LAUNCH knob (llama-server --chat-template-kwargs '{"reasoning_effort":"low"}'); template default is medium when unset. Relaunch per effort cell and verify via /props before a round. temp 1.0 top_p 1.0 per OpenAI; no repetition penalties; harmony - no grammar constraints.

gpt-oss-20b-medium.notes: reasoning_effort=medium is a SERVER-LAUNCH knob (llama-server --chat-template-kwargs '{"reasoning_effort":"medium"}'); template default is medium when unset. Relaunch per effort cell and verify via /props before a round. temp 1.0 top_p 1.0 per OpenAI; no repetition penalties; harmony - no grammar constraints.

gpt-oss-20b-high.notes: reasoning_effort=high is a SERVER-LAUNCH knob (llama-server --chat-template-kwargs '{"reasoning_effort":"high"}'); template default is medium when unset. Relaunch per effort cell and verify via /props before a round. temp 1.0 top_p 1.0 per OpenAI; no repetition penalties; harmony - no grammar constraints.

qwen3.5-9b-udq4.notes: The freeze-grid qwen profile: embed server evicted from the 3070 Ti so the larger UD quant fits. Same endpoint and sampler as qwen3.5-9b; a distinct profile name keeps the two quants apart in every run record.
